name: FEDERAL REALTY INVESTMENT TRUST
business: Federal Realty Investment Trust specializes in the ownership, management, and redevelopment of high quality retail and mixed-use properties, primarily in major coastal markets. The company generates revenue primarily from lease agreements with tenants occupying its properties. It has paid quarterly dividends continuously since 1962 and increased dividends per common share for 58 consecutive years.

exposures.sentence: A shift in retail shopping from brick and mortar stores to online shopping may have an adverse impact on our cash flow, financial condition and results of operations.
